case_title: MOORE JUDITH A. VS MCWILLIAMS RICHARD

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MCWILLIAMS RICHARD
